results.name: alg_subst_expand
results.statement: theorem alg_subst_expand (x y : ℝ) (h : x = y + 1) : x^2 - 2*x + 1 = y^2
results.ground_truth_proof: rw [h]; ring

results.name: alg_subst_factor
results.statement: theorem alg_subst_factor (a b : ℝ) (h : a = b + 2) : a^2 - b^2 = 4*b + 4
results.ground_truth_proof: rw [h]; ring

results.name: alg_cross_multiply
results.statement: theorem alg_cross_multiply (a b c d : ℝ) (hb : b ≠ 0) (hd : d ≠ 0) (h : a / b = c / d) : a * d = b * c
results.ground_truth_proof: have h' := congrArg (fun t => t * (b * d)) h; field_simp [hb, hd] at h'; exact h'

results.name: alg_fraction_split
results.statement: theorem alg_fraction_split (a b c : ℝ) (hc : c ≠ 0) : (a + b) / c = a / c + b / c
results.ground_truth_proof: field_simp [hc]; ring

results.name: alg_ratio_identity
results.statement: theorem alg_ratio_identity (x y : ℝ) (hx : x ≠ 0) (hy : y ≠ 0) : (x / y) * (y / x) = 1
results.ground_truth_proof: field_simp [hx, hy]

results.name: alg_complete_square
results.statement: theorem alg_complete_square (a b x : ℝ) (h : x = -b/(2*a)) (ha : a ≠ 0) : a*x^2 + b*x = -b^2/(4*a)
results.ground_truth_proof: rw [h]; field_simp [ha]; ring

results.name: alg_amgm_two
results.statement: theorem alg_amgm_two (x y : ℝ) (hx : 0 ≤ x) (hy : 0 ≤ y) : x^2 + y^2 ≥ 2*x*y
results.ground_truth_proof: have h : (x - y)^2 ≥ 0 := pow_two_nonneg _; nlinarith

results.name: poly_deriv_product
results.statement: theorem poly_deriv_product (p q : Polynomial ℝ) : (p * q).derivative = p.derivative * q + p * q.derivative
results.ground_truth_proof: rw [Polynomial.derivative_mul]; rfl

results.name: poly_root_factor
results.statement: theorem poly_root_factor (p : Polynomial ℝ) (a : ℝ) (h : p.eval a = 0) : (Polynomial.X - Polynomial.C a) ∣ p
results.ground_truth_proof: apply Polynomial.dvd_iff_isRoot.mpr; rw [Polynomial.IsRoot]; exact h

results.name: poly_degree_leading_term
results.statement: theorem poly_degree_leading_term (p q : Polynomial ℝ) (hp : p.natDegree > q.natDegree) (hq : q ≠ 0) : (p + q).natDegree = p.natDegree
results.ground_truth_proof: apply Polynomial.natDegree_add_eq_left_of_natDegree_lt; apply lt_of_lt_of_le ?_ (Nat.zero_le _); exact hp

results.name: poly_iterated_deriv
results.statement: theorem poly_iterated_deriv (n m : ℕ) : Function.iterate Polynomial.derivative n ∘ Function.iterate Polynomial.derivative m = Function.iterate Polynomial.derivative (n + m)
results.ground_truth_proof: ext p; rw [Function.iterate_add, Function.comp_apply]

results.name: ana_triangle_rev
results.statement: theorem ana_triangle_rev (x y : ℝ) : |x| - |y| ≤ |x - y|
results.ground_truth_proof: have h := abs_sub_abs_le_abs_sub x y; linarith

results.name: ana_eps_delta
results.statement: theorem ana_eps_delta (x y δ ε : ℝ) (hδ : |x - y| < δ) (hδε : δ ≤ ε) : |x - y| < ε
results.ground_truth_proof: have h := lt_of_lt_of_le hδ hδε; exact h

results.name: ana_cs_two_dim
results.statement: theorem ana_cs_two_dim (a b x y : ℝ) : (a*x + b*y)^2 ≤ (a^2 + b^2)*(x^2 + y^2)
results.ground_truth_proof: nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a*y - b*x)]

results.name: ana_sum_sq_bound
results.statement: theorem ana_sum_sq_bound (x y : ℝ) : (x + y)^2 ≤ 2*(x^2 + y^2)
results.ground_truth_proof: have h : (x - y)^2 ≥ 0 := pow_two_nonneg _; nlinarith

results.name: ana_abs_prod_pos
results.statement: theorem ana_abs_prod_pos (x y : ℝ) (hx : x ≠ 0) (hy : y ≠ 0) : |x * y| > 0
results.ground_truth_proof: apply abs_pos.mpr; exact mul_ne_zero hx hy

results.name: ana_sq_mono
results.statement: theorem ana_sq_mono (a b : ℝ) (ha : 0 ≤ a) (h : a ≤ b) : a^2 ≤ b^2
results.ground_truth_proof: nlinarith

results.name: ana_ratio_test
results.statement: theorem ana_ratio_test (a r : ℝ) (hr : 0 ≤ r) (hr1 : r < 1) (h : |a| ≤ r) : |a| < 1
results.ground_truth_proof: have hlt : r < 1 := hr1; linarith

results.name: ana_midpoint_bound
results.statement: theorem ana_midpoint_bound (a b v : ℝ) (hle : a ≤ b) (hV : a ≤ v) (hVb : v ≤ b) : |v - (a + b)/2| ≤ (b - a)/2
results.ground_truth_proof: have hmid : (a + b)/2 - a = (b - a)/2 := by ring; have hbmid : b - (a + b)/2 = (b - a)/2 := by ring; nlinarith

results.name: ana_sum_abs_bound
results.statement: theorem ana_sum_abs_bound (x y M : ℝ) (hx : |x| ≤ M) (hy : |y| ≤ M) : |x + y| ≤ 2*M
results.ground_truth_proof:
calc
  |x + y| ≤ |x| + |y| := abs_add _ _
  _ ≤ M + M := add_le_add hx hy
  _ = 2*M := by ring

results.name: ana_bernstein_bounds
results.statement: theorem ana_bernstein_bounds (x n : ℝ) (hn0 : n ≥ 0) (hx0 : 0 ≤ x) (hx1 : x ≤ 1) : 0 ≤ (1 - x)^n ∧ (1 - x)^n ≤ 1
results.ground_truth_proof: have h_base : 0 ≤ 1 - x := by linarith; have h_ub : 1 - x ≤ 1 := by linarith; constructor; exact pow_nonneg h_base (by exact_mod_cast hn0); exact pow_le_one _ h_base h_ub

results.name: era_ke_classical
results.statement: theorem era_ke_classical (m v : ℝ) (hm : m > 0) : (1/2) * m * v^2 ≥ 0
results.ground_truth_proof: nlinarith [sq_nonneg v]

results.name: era_rest_energy
results.statement: theorem era_rest_energy (m c : ℝ) (hm : m ≥ 0) (hc : c > 0) : m * c^2 ≥ 0
results.ground_truth_proof: nlinarith [sq_nonneg c]

results.name: era_galileo_velocity
results.statement: theorem era_galileo_velocity (u v w : ℝ) (h : w = u + v) : w - u = v
results.ground_truth_proof: rw [h]; ring

results.name: era_lorentz_bound
results.statement: theorem era_lorentz_bound (v c : ℝ) (hc : c > 0) (hv : |v| < c) : v^2 / c^2 < 1
results.ground_truth_proof: have h_sq_pos : c^2 > 0 := pow_pos hc 2; exact (div_lt_one h_sq_pos).mpr (by nlinarith)

results.name: era_photon_quantum
results.statement: theorem era_photon_quantum (E ν h : ℝ) (hh : h > 0) (hr : E = h*ν) : E / h = ν
results.ground_truth_proof: rw [hr]; field_simp [hh.ne.symm]

results.name: era_absolute_time
results.statement: theorem era_absolute_time (t1 t2 Δt : ℝ) (h : t2 = t1 + Δt) : t2 - t1 = Δt
results.ground_truth_proof: rw [h]; ring

results.name: era_time_dilation
results.statement: theorem era_time_dilation (Δt v c : ℝ) (hc : c > 0) (hv : 0 ≤ v) (hv_lt : v < c) (h : Δt ≥ 0) : Δt / Real.sqrt (1 - v^2/c^2) ≥ Δt
results.ground_truth_proof:
have h_sqrt : 0 < Real.sqrt (1 - v^2/c^2) ∧ Real.sqrt (1 - v^2/c^2) ≤ 1 := by
  have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ 1 - v^2/c^2 := by
    have h_sq : v^2/c^2 < 1 := by
      have h_sq_pos : c^2 > 0 := pow_pos hc 2
      exact (div_lt_one h_sq_pos).mpr (by nlinarith)
    nlinarith
  have h_sqrt_pos : 0 < Real.sqrt (1 - v^2/c^2) := Real.sqrt_pos.mpr (by nlinarith)
  have h_sqrt_le : Real.sqrt (1 - v^2/c^2) ≤ 1 := Real.sqrt_le_one h_nonneg
  exact ⟨h_sqrt_pos, h_sqrt_le⟩
apply (one_le_div ?_ h).mpr h_sqrt.2; exact ⟨h_sqrt.1, h⟩

results.name: era_debroglie_wavelength
results.statement: theorem era_debroglie_wavelength (h λ p : ℝ) (hλ : λ ≠ 0) (hp : p = h / λ) : p * λ = h
results.ground_truth_proof: rw [hp]; field_simp [hλ]

results.name: era_classical_measure
results.statement: theorem era_classical_measure (x p ε : ℝ) (h : |x - p| < ε) (hε : ε > 0) : p - ε < x ∧ x < p + ε
results.ground_truth_proof: constructor; linarith; linarith

results.name: era_heisenberg_bound
results.statement: theorem era_heisenberg_bound (Δx Δp ℏ : ℝ) (hℏ : ℏ > 0) (h : Δx * Δp ≥ ℏ/2) : Δx > 0 ∧ Δp > 0
results.ground_truth_proof:
constructor
· by_contra hx; push_neg at hx; have h1 : Δx * Δp ≤ 0 := mul_nonpos_of_nonpos_of_nonneg hx (by nlinarith); linarith
· by_contra hp; push_neg at hp; have h2 : Δx * Δp ≤ 0 := mul_nonpos_of_nonneg_of_nonpos (by nlinarith) hp; linarith

results.name: logic_contrapositive
results.statement: theorem logic_contrapositive (P Q R : Prop) (hPQ : P → Q) (hQR : Q → R) : ¬R → ¬P
results.ground_truth_proof: intro hnR hP; apply hnR; apply hQR; apply hPQ; exact hP

results.name: logic_cases_or
results.statement: theorem logic_cases_or (P Q R : Prop) (hPQ : P → R) (hQR : Q → R) (h_or : P ∨ Q) : R
results.ground_truth_proof: rcases h_or with (hP | hQ); exact hPQ hP; exact hQR hQ

results.name: logic_demorgan
results.statement: theorem logic_demorgan (P Q : Prop) : ¬(P ∧ Q) ↔ (¬P ∨ ¬Q)
results.ground_truth_proof:
constructor
· intro h; by_cases hP : P; right; intro hQ; apply h; exact ⟨hP, hQ⟩; left; exact hP
· intro h hPQ; rcases hPQ with ⟨hP, hQ⟩; rcases h with (hNP | hNQ); exact hNP hP; exact hNQ hQ

results.name: logic_iff_trans
results.statement: theorem logic_iff_trans (P Q R : Prop) (hPQ : P ↔ Q) (hQR : Q ↔ R) : P ↔ R
results.ground_truth_proof: constructor; intro hP; exact hQR.mp (hPQ.mp hP); intro hR; exact hPQ.mpr (hQR.mpr hR)

results.name: logic_modus_tollens
results.statement: theorem logic_modus_tollens (P Q R : Prop) (hPQ : P → Q) (hQR : Q → R) (hnR : ¬R) : ¬P
results.ground_truth_proof: intro hP; apply hnR; apply hQR; apply hPQ; exact hP

results.name: nt_sum_first_n
results.statement: theorem nt_sum_first_n (n : ℕ) : 2 * (∑ k in Finset.range n, k) = n * (n - 1)
results.ground_truth_proof:
induction' n with k ih
· simp
· rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, mul_add, add_comm, ← add_assoc, ih]; ring

results.name: hard_quadratic_formula
results.statement: theorem hard_quadratic_formula (a b c x : ℝ) (ha : a ≠ 0) (h : a*x^2 + b*x + c = 0) : (2*a*x + b)^2 = b^2 - 4*a*c
results.ground_truth_proof: have h_discr : 4*a*(a*x^2 + b*x + c) = 0 := by rw [h]; ring; nlinarith

results.name: hard_mvt_inequality
results.statement: theorem hard_mvt_inequality (x y : ℝ) (hxy : x ≤ y) : x^3 - y^3 ≤ 3*y^2*(x - y)
results.ground_truth_proof: have h_diff : x^3 - y^3 = (x - y)*(x^2 + x*y + y^2) := by ring; rw [h_diff]; have h_nonpos : x - y ≤ 0 := by linarith; nlinarith [sq_nonneg x, sq_nonneg y]

results.name: hard_telescoping
results.statement: theorem hard_telescoping (n : ℕ) : (∑ k in Finset.range n, (1 : ℝ)/((k:ℝ)+1) - (1 : ℝ)/((k:ℝ)+2)) = 1 - 1/((n:ℝ)+1)
results.ground_truth_proof:
induction' n with m ih
· simp
· rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, ih]; push_cast; ring

results.name: hard_amgm_sqrt
results.statement: theorem hard_amgm_sqrt (x y : ℝ) (hx : x ≥ 0) (hy : y ≥ 0) : (x + y)/2 ≥ Real.sqrt (x*y)
results.ground_truth_proof: have h_nonneg : (Real.sqrt x - Real.sqrt y)^2 ≥ 0 := pow_two_nonneg _; nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt hx, Real.sq_sqrt hy]

results.name: hard_cubic_formula_factor
results.statement: theorem hard_cubic_formula_factor (a b c d x : ℝ) (h : a*x^3 + b*x^2 + c*x + d = 0) (hr : x = 1) : a + b + c + d = 0
results.ground_truth_proof: rw [hr] at h; nlinarith

results.name: hard_sq_eq_ineq_chain
results.statement: theorem hard_sq_eq_ineq_chain (x : ℝ) (h : x^2 = 4*x - 4) : x = 2
results.ground_truth_proof: have h_sq : (x - 2)^2 = 0 := by nlinarith; nlinarith

results.name: hard_poly_interp_two
results.statement: theorem hard_poly_interp_two (x0 x1 y0 y1 : ℝ) (hx : x0 ≠ x1) : ∃ (p : Polynomial ℝ), p.eval x0 = y0 ∧ p.eval x1 = y1
results.ground_truth_proof:
refine ⟨Polynomial.C ((y0*x1 - y1*x0)/(x1 - x0)) + Polynomial.C ((y1 - y0)/(x1 - x0)) * Polynomial.X, ?_, ?_⟩
· field_simp [hx]; ring
· field_simp [hx]; ring

results.name: hard_system_substitution
results.statement: theorem hard_system_substitution (x y z a b : ℝ) (h1 : x + 2*y = a) (h2 : y - z = b) (h3 : x = y) : 3*y - z = a + b
results.ground_truth_proof: rw [h3] at h1; have hy : y = a/3 := by linarith; rw [hy] at h2; linarith

results.name: hard_abs_ineq_mul
results.statement: theorem hard_abs_ineq_mul (a b : ℝ) (ha : |a| ≤ 1) (hb : |b| ≤ 1) : |a*b| ≤ 1
results.ground_truth_proof: rw [abs_mul]; have h_nonneg_a : 0 ≤ |a| := abs_nonneg _; have h_nonneg_b : 0 ≤ |b| := abs_nonneg _; nlinarith

results.name: hard_poly_remainder
results.statement: theorem hard_poly_remainder (p : Polynomial ℝ) (a r : ℝ) (h : p.eval a = r) : (p - Polynomial.C r).eval a = 0
results.ground_truth_proof: rw [Polynomial.eval_sub, h, Polynomial.eval_C]; ring

results.name: alg_linear_system_v2
results.statement: theorem alg_linear_system_v2 (x y a b : ℝ) (h1 : x + y = a) (h2 : x - y = b) : x = (a + b) / 2 ∧ y = (a - b) / 2
results.ground_truth_proof: have hx : x = (a + b)/2 := by linarith; have hy : y = (a - b)/2 := by linarith; exact And.intro hx hy

results.name: alg_ratio_bound_v2
results.statement: theorem alg_ratio_bound_v2 (a b : ℝ) (ha : a > 0) (hb : b > 0) (h : a ≤ b) : a / b ≤ 1 ∧ b / a ≥ 1
results.ground_truth_proof: have h1 : a / b ≤ 1 := (div_le_one hb).mpr h; have h2 : 1 ≤ b / a := by rw [← one_le_div ha]; exact h; exact And.intro h1 h2

results.name: alg_sq_factor_v2
results.statement: theorem alg_sq_factor_v2 (a b : ℝ) : a^2 - b^2 = (a - b)*(a + b) ∧ (a + b)^2 = a^2 + 2*a*b + b^2
results.ground_truth_proof: constructor; ring; ring

results.name: alg_cubic_v2
results.ground_truth_proof: constructor; ring; ring

results.name: alg_prod_v2
results.statement: theorem alg_prod_v2 (a b : ℝ) : (a + b)^2 - (a - b)^2 = 4*a*b ∧ (a^2 + b^2)^2 ≥ 0
results.ground_truth_proof: constructor; ring; positivity

results.name: alg_sqrt_v2
results.statement: theorem alg_sqrt_v2 (p q : ℝ) (hp : p ≥ 0) (hq : q ≥ 0) : Real.sqrt (p*q) = Real.sqrt p * Real.sqrt q ∧ Real.sqrt p ≥ 0
results.ground_truth_proof: have h := Real.sqrt_mul hp q; constructor; exact h; exact Real.sqrt_nonneg _

results.name: poly_degree_v2
results.statement: theorem poly_degree_v2 (p q : Polynomial ℝ) : (p + q).degree ≤ max p.degree q.degree ∧ (p + q).natDegree ≤ max p.natDegree q.natDegree
results.ground_truth_proof: constructor; rw [Polynomial.degree_add_le]; exact le_rfl; rw [Polynomial.natDegree_add_le]; exact le_rfl

results.name: poly_deg_mul_v2
results.statement: theorem poly_deg_mul_v2 (p q : Polynomial ℝ) (hp : p ≠ 0) (hq : q ≠ 0) : (p * q).natDegree = p.natDegree + q.natDegree ∧ (p * q).degree = p.degree + q.degree
results.ground_truth_proof: constructor; rw [Polynomial.natDegree_mul hp hq]; rw [Polynomial.degree_mul]; exact rfl

results.name: poly_monic_v2
results.statement: theorem poly_monic_v2 (p q : Polynomial ℝ) (hp : p.Monic) (hq : q.Monic) : (p * q).Monic ∧ (p + q).leadingCoeff = p.leadingCoeff + q.leadingCoeff
results.ground_truth_proof: have h := Polynomial.Monic.mul hp hq; constructor; exact h; simp [hp.leadingCoeff, hq.leadingCoeff]

results.name: era_newton_gravity_v2
results.statement: theorem era_newton_gravity_v2 (G m1 m2 r : ℝ) (hr : r > 0) : G*m1*m2/r^2 > 0 ∧ G*m2*m1/r^2 > 0
results.ground_truth_proof: constructor; apply div_pos; apply mul_pos; apply mul_pos; nlinarith [hr]; nlinarith [hr]; nlinarith [hr]; apply div_pos; apply mul_pos; apply mul_pos; nlinarith [hr]; nlinarith [hr]; nlinarith [hr]

results.name: era_einstein_v2
results.statement: theorem era_einstein_v2 (R gμν Tμν Λ G c : ℝ) (hc : c > 0) (hG : G > 0) (h : R - (1/2)*R*gμν + Λ*gμν = (8*π*G/c^4)*Tμν) : R = -(8*π*G/c^4)*Tμν + (1/2)*R*gμν - Λ*gμν ∧ (8*π*G/c^4)*Tμν ≥ 0
results.ground_truth_proof: have hR := by linarith; constructor; exact hR; positivity

results.name: era_maxwell_v2
results.statement: theorem era_maxwell_v2 (E1 E2 : ℝ) (h : E1 = E2) : E1^2 = E2^2 ∧ |E1| = |E2|
results.ground_truth_proof: constructor; rw [h]; rw [h]

results.name: era_newton_mom_v2
results.statement: theorem era_newton_mom_v2 (m v a : ℝ) (ha : v = a) : m*v = m*a ∧ v*m = a*m
results.ground_truth_proof: constructor; rw [ha]; rw [ha, mul_comm]

results.name: era_classical_prob_v2
results.statement: theorem era_classical_prob_v2 (p1 p2 : ℝ) (hp1 : 0 ≤ p1) (hp2 : 0 ≤ p2) (hsum : p1 + p2 = 1) : p1 ≤ 1 ∧ p2 ≤ 1
results.ground_truth_proof: constructor; linarith; linarith

results.name: era_quantum_born_v2
results.statement: theorem era_quantum_born_v2 (ψ₁ ψ₂ : ℝ) : (ψ₁ + ψ₂)^2 = ψ₁^2 + 2*ψ₁*ψ₂ + ψ₂^2 ∧ (ψ₁ - ψ₂)^2 = ψ₁^2 - 2*ψ₁*ψ₂ + ψ₂^2
results.ground_truth_proof: constructor; ring; ring

results.name: nt_dvd_trans_v2
results.statement: theorem nt_dvd_trans_v2 (a b c : ℕ) (hab : a ∣ b) (hbc : b ∣ c) : a ∣ c ∧ a ∣ b + c
results.ground_truth_proof: have h_ac : a ∣ c := Nat.dvd_trans hab hbc; have h_sum : a ∣ b + c := by apply Nat.dvd_add hab h_ac; constructor; exact h_ac; exact h_sum

results.name: nt_euclid_v2
results.statement: theorem nt_euclid_v2 (a b p : ℕ) (hp : Nat.Prime p) (h : p ∣ a * b) : p ∣ a ∨ p ∣ b
results.ground_truth_proof: have h_or := hp.dvd_mul.mp h; rcases h_or with (hpa | hpb); left; exact hpa; right; exact hpb
